title: The Curse of a Bloodline
description: On pages 1–3, this part follows Unknown person #1, King Harald, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, World Government as The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.
scene: The story examines the bloodline hatred and political violence surrounding Elbaf while the danger around Loki and the God’s Knights grows.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: 33 YEARS AGO (FIVE YEARS AFTER GOD VALLEY)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I could've sworn pirates were approaching off the shore!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Post-God Valley World...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: MMMM...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But there was something Huuuuge and Shadow emerging from the mist behind them!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THE UNDERWATER PRISON - IMPEL DOWN

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everything just went kaboom after that!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Our ship was in ruins before we knew it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: We were nothin' but fish food!!

dialogue.speaker: King Harald
dialogue.text: Sure it wasn't a sea king attack?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No way!! It was shaped like a human!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't tell me you were in the infamous waters of the Florian triangle?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Fat chance!! We don't fish near that region!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Everyone knows to avoid it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Anyway, that monstrous thing was definitely human-like!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: During this period, a rumor began to circulate...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...Among the grand line countries.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They said a monster lurked deep in the foggy seas, targeting pirate crews.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: WoA!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The identity of that monster monster was none other than Harold.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: few who sailed those waters had ever seen a giant with their own eyes...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So to them, he was nothing less than the very embodiment of fear.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Harald now worked in the shadows to back up the Navy as part of his atonement for the last thousand years of history.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Meanwhile, the pirates who had gone their separate ways after God valley...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...continued to rise in prominence, and over the next decade or so...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: each of them would peak to become a defining face of their generation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Most of these pirates...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: ...Simply flashed over territory.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: However, one crew broke through all the others...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: AND ACHIEVED A FEAT LONG BELIEVED IMPOSIBLE: THEY CIRCUMNAVIGATED THE ENTIRE WORLD!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: They were hailed as the crew of the King of the Pirates- Gold Roger!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The public execution of the captured pirate King was meant to serve as a spectacle...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A display of the world government's power. However...

summary: This part advances The Weight of Elbaf’s Bloodline through 33 cleaned dialogue beats, focusing on the immediate conflict, character reactions, and the larger Elbaf mystery.
